anti_capture_rules: Company equity or revenue cannot override standing, challenge, or fork rights.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for company seed exploration only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: A company seed is production-grade only when its value loop, governance, customer pain, and commons return are explicit.

canon_conditions: The company creates real value without weakening SAB's commons or challenge rights.
compost_conditions: The company depends on secrecy, capture, or private certification rent.

strongest_objections: The company may convert public trust into private leverage.

failure_conditions: The business model requires hiding evidence or selling favorable standing.
claim.scope: A company that can commercialize SAB-compatible infrastructure without owning SAB's truth layer.
success_conditions: Revenue strengthens open methods, evidence quality, and public-good infrastructure.
claim.text: This company seed can turn SAB-compatible work into economic power while preserving commons governance.

commons_return.minimum_return: A defined share of learning, tooling, schemas, or revenue-equivalent value returns to the commons.

title: Company Seed Template
